name: Eliana Lopes

handling.tone: Portuguese surname (Lopes) + Taunton MA (heavy Portuguese-Brazilian community) = bilingual-aware. Day 1 was too aggressive — back off and give her room. One short, respectful re-engagement.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: brief, warm, Portuguese tag where natural. Don't pile on more drip — that created the silence.
handling.context: Inbound Apr 23 from FB Lead Form. 8 weeks out (HIGH urgency). 60-70 guests, $1,950 ballpark. Day 1 push was very heavy (2 calls, 2 emails, 2 SMS) and she shut down. Cultural fit perfect.

context_anchors: Lopes = Portuguese surname, common in Taunton MA
Day 1 push was overwhelming — back off

lead.source: FB Lead Form — VIDEO RODS WEDDING & FACELESS
lead.next_move: Short bilingual binary: 'still looking, or already fechou com alguém?'

enrichment.identity_notes: Lopes Portuguese surname, especially prevalent in MA (heavy Portuguese-Brazilian in Taunton, Fall River, New Bedford, Brockton). Combined with Taunton zip + Comeketo lead form = very likely Brazilian/Portuguese cultural background.
win_angles: Portuguese cultural angle, gently — open EN with soft PT tag ('Tudo bem?')
Backing off gives her room — Day 1 was overwhelming
Birthday at 60-70 = mid-budget, appetizer-forward, full meal possibly drop-off + bar
nepq_openers: PT/EN: 'Oi Eliana — tudo bem? June 20 está chegando rápido. Pra eu não te encher de mensagem, me responde uma só: você ainda está procurando catering pra essa festa, ou já fechou com alguém?'
Or EN: 'Eliana, June 20 is getting close — I don't want to keep filling your inbox. Just one quick question: are you still looking for catering for the party, or did you go with someone else?'
Anchor: 'For 60-70, depending on drop-off vs buffet vs full-service, $X-Y. Want me to send a quick comparison?'
open_gaps: Is she still looking, or committed elsewhere?
Cultural cuisine preference (Brazilian-leaning vs mixed American)
enrichment.strategic_note: Went cold because Day 1 was too aggressive. ONE short respectful re-engagement giving binary. If she comes back, conversation restarts. If not, status to 'Probably Not.' Resist piling on more drip.

notes: If silent past Apr 30, status to Probably Not
